name: skillhub
description: A community skill hub for Claude — human-curated, usage-ranked, security-reviewed skills. Each skill is its own plugin: install only the ones you want, browse their descriptions before installing, uninstall any independently.

plugins.name: pr-description-craft
plugins.description: 写/审 PR 时强制「为什么改/改了什么/怎么验证」三段式。Enforce a why/what/how-verified PR description.

plugins.name: psql-field-diagnostics
plugins.description: 在 psql 里手查 PostgreSQL 数据/性能问题的现场工具箱。A field toolbox for hand-debugging Postgres in psql.

plugins.name: evidence-before-adoption
plugins.description: 接受改动/性能主张/汇报前先要真实证据。Demand real evidence before adopting a change or trusting a report.
